Suomenkieliset koulut:

Tässä osassa kuulet viisi uutista. Kuulet kunkin uutisen vain kerran. Kuultuasi uutisen vastaa kysymykseen lyhyesti suomeksi. Kirjoita vastauksesi selvällä käsialalla kielikokeen vastauslomakkeen A-puolelle.

questions.main_text: Which of the following is true of dog ownership in the UK?

content.text: Which of the following is true of dog ownership in the UK?

options.text: Within the last decades, cats are gaining in popularity over dogs
Responsibility for a dog’s actions are delegated to others
The range of breeds being bought has increased significantly

questions.main_text: How are YouTube stars made?

content.text: How are YouTube stars made?

options.text: Through keeping fresh content on at all times
By finding a special category for marketing
With the help of the film industry

options.text: He had made a promise to his mother
He only knew words, not sentences

questions.main_text:
Miksi festivaaleilla käyminen voi puhujan mukaan olla

haasteellista? Miten Skotlannin festivaaleilla käyminen on hänen mukaansa muuttunut luonteeltaan?
questions.feedback:
**Täydet pisteet antava vastaus sisältää:**

– Kaikkialle ehtiminen vaatii helikopteria. / On lähes mahdotonta / erittäin hankalaa ehtiä

kaikkialle ilman helikopteria. (2 p.)

− Niistä on tullut pistäytymisen sijaan pikku lomia. / Niillä viivytään pidempään. (2 p.)

content.text:
Miksi festivaaleilla käyminen voi puhujan mukaan olla

haasteellista? Miten Skotlannin festivaaleilla käyminen on hänen mukaansa muuttunut luonteeltaan?

questions.main_text: Why does an interviewer ask you about animals?

content.text: Why does an interviewer ask you about animals?

options.text: To discover how clever you are at inventing answers
To attempt to see how you react when asked silly questions

questions.main_text: Answer questions 1–26 by choosing the best alternative. Mark your answers **on the optical answer sheet in pencil.**

content.text: Answer questions 1–26 by choosing the best alternative. Mark your answers **on the optical answer sheet in pencil.**

questions.main_text: What does the project carried out by Brian Nosek’s team demonstrate?

content.text: What does the project carried out by Brian Nosek’s team demonstrate?

options.text: Personal biases account for the discrepancies in results
Blatant deceptions account for the discrepancies in results
Lagging incentives account for the discrepancies in results

questions.main_text: What are NASA and the University of California doing with this development?

content.text: What are NASA and the University of California doing with this development?

options.text: Figuring out their relative shares of sales
Looking for further uses for this idea

questions.main_text: Which view of life does Grace seem to subscribe to?

content.text: Which view of life does Grace seem to subscribe to?

options.text: People can shape their own destiny

questions.main_text: What did she find at Glacier Peaks High School?

content.text: What did she find at Glacier Peaks High School?

options.text: An indifference towards newcomers to the school
True compassion for and interest in all aspects of school life
The complete realization of social and study ideals

​

content.text: Mitä tämä Ohion laki määrää? Keitä se hyödyttää?

options.text: Convince yourself that you have the right capabilities
Show you are a better worker than the others
